content.full_text:
Fern Polrucal PnacrrcEs CouvrrssroN
428 J Street r Suite 620 o Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 o Fax (916) 322-0886
October 29,2003
James A. Otto
Law Office of James A. Otto
19536 San Jose Street
Northridge, CA91326
Re
Your Request for Advice
Our FiIe No. W-03-213
Dear Mr. Otto:
This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the revolving door
provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").I The Act requires the Commission to
provide written advice to any person whose duties under the Act are in question or to that
person's authorized representative. (Section 831 la@); regulation 18329(a)(copy
enclosed.) However, the Commission may decline to provide written advice if it would
be inappropriate or otherwise not in the public interest to do so. (Regulation
1832e(bx8xF).)
Formal written advice is the application of law to a given set of facts provided by
the requestor and has the purpose of conferring immunity to the requestor. (Section
83114; regulation 18329(b)(7).) After a careful review of the facts you provided, we
decline to provide written advice to you at this time. The same or similar issues are
currently the subject of a pending investigation by the Enforcement Division.
Should you have any questions, please contact the commission at (916) 322-
s660
Sincerely,
Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel
By:
S
Legal Division
Enclosure
JSJg
I Government Code sections 81000 - gl}l4.
18996, of the Califomia Code of Regulations.
Commission
fr
regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109 -

sections.conclusion: After a careful review of the facts you provided, we decline to provide written advice to you at this time. The same or similar issues are currently the subject of a pending investigation by the Enforcement Division.
sections.question_synthetic: The requestor sought advice regarding the revolving door provisions of the Political Reform Act and whether certain conduct complies with those provisions.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC declined to provide written advice because the same or similar issues are currently the subject of a pending investigation by the Enforcement Division.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is a declination letter (File No. W-03-213). No formal Question or Conclusion sections are present in the document, but the substance of the request and the FPPC's decision are clearly stated in the letter body. The requestor's specific factual scenario is not detailed in this response document.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: The requestor sought advice regarding the revolving door provisions of the Political Reform Act and whether certain conduct complies with those provisions.

CONCLUSION: After a careful review of the facts you provided, we decline to provide written advice to you at this time. The same or similar issues are currently the subject of a pending investigation by the Enforcement Division.

embedding.summary: The FPPC declined James A. Otto's request for written advice regarding the revolving door provisions of the Political Reform Act due to a pending investigation by the Enforcement Division involving the same or similar issues.
